classObjective: Recognize special cases where an absolute value inequality has no solution or all real numbers as solutions and solve inequalities with fractional coefficients.
workedExamples: 6-4, Example 4 — Special Cases (No Solution and All Real Numbers)
6-4, Example 5 — Fractional Coefficients and Mixed Practice
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: negative right-hand side analysis; fractional coefficient handling; special case identification
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice recognizing special cases and solving inequalities with fractional coefficients
independentPractice: Practice problems solving absolute value inequalities including special cases and fractional coefficients
assessment: Exit ticket: solve |x + 2| + 5 < 5 and identify if it has no solution or all real numbers
capReflection: How can you quickly determine if an absolute value inequality has no solution or all real numbers?
